intro: A concentrated series of high-severity cyber operations from April 2026 has heavily targeted the global cryptocurrency and technology sectors. The attacks, attributed to distinct threat actors Lazarus Group, APT37 (ScarCruft, InkySquid), and Sapphire Sleet, also impacted software development, venture capital, and web3 industries. All six documented incidents were assessed as high severity, demonstrating a focused campaign against these interconnected digital asset and innovation spaces on a worldwide scale.
